THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACEY, RONISHA THIS JUDGMENT FOR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF TO ABATE A PUBLIC NUISANCE SHALL CONSTITUTE A JUDIIALLY ENFORCEABLE SETTLEMENT AS DEFINED BY CCP 664.6. AS SUCH, THE COURT SHALL RETAIN JURISDICTION OVER THE PARTIES TO ENFORCE THIS JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
